info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all campaigns, with optional filtering.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`
`name`: `contains`
`archived`: `equals`
`builder`: `equals`
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`updated_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Create a campaign with inline audiences, messages, and variations.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

requestBody.description: Create an omnicampaign with inline audiences, messages, and variations.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get a campaign by ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The campaign ID to be retrieved

schema.description: The campaign ID to be retrieved

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Update a campaign with the given campaign ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The campaign ID to be updated

schema.description: The campaign ID to be updated

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Delete a campaign with the given campaign ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The campaign ID to be deleted

schema.description: The campaign ID to be deleted

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all messages for the given campaign.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all campaign message [relationships](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/api_overview#relationships) for the given campaign ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all campaign audiences for the given campaign ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-07-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all campaign audience [relationships](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/reference/api_overview#relationships) for the given campaign ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read`

included.description: The list of included group IDs

excluded.description: The list of excluded group IDs

temporary_id.description: Client-supplied temporary ID. Messages reference this value via audience_temporary_id to establish the audience-message relationship.

excluded.description: The list of excluded group IDs

id.description: The ID of the audience

created.description: The datetime when this audience was created

updated.description: The datetime when this audience was last updated

Related Campaign Messages

definition.description: The campaign definition containing audiences and optional messages

messages.description: Messages to create on this campaign. Each references an audience via audience_temporary_id.

audiences.description: Audiences to create on this campaign. Each references a message via audience_temporary_id.

id.description: The audiences associated with the campaign
The messages associated with the campaign
The tags associated with the campaign

is_add_utm.description: Whether to add UTM parameters to links in this message

throttling_type.description: Smart sending throttling configuration for this message

variations.description: Inline variations for this message. Default variation created if omitted.

The content variations for this message

send_times.description: Per-variation send times, keyed by variation ID. Populated for send-time optimization and AB send time test strategies.

send_strategy.description: The scheduling strategy for this message.

recipient_percentage.description: The percentage of recipients to send this message to

throttling_type.description: The throttling type for this message

is_ignoring_unsubscribes.description: Whether to ignore unsubscribes for this message

action_type.description: The action type for a push notification action button.

badge_config.description: A push message variation's badge config.

push_type.description: A push message variation's push type.

text_message_type.description:
A sms message variation's text message type.

Values match the Django OmniSMSTextMessageType (MESSAGE_FORMAT_*)
    constants.

exit_condition_enabled.description: Whether exit conditions are enabled for this campaign

exit_condition_conversion_metric_id.description: The conversion metric ID used for exit conditions

details.description: The channel-specific content details for this variation

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
